sources.name: ICED — State-wise Deep Dive (NITI Aayog), originally MoRTH VAHAN

license.name: Government of India Open Data License

indicator.title: EV registrations by state and vehicle category
indicator.description: Annual count of electric vehicles newly registered in each state, broken down by vehicle category (2-wheeler, 3-wheeler, 4-wheeler, bus, others). Sourced from MoRTH VAHAN dashboard via NITI Aayog ICED. Note: VAHAN excludes Telangana for some years (state runs its own RTO database) — gaps are real, not data-pipeline failures.
indicator.methodology_vintage: MoRTH VAHAN registration database (excludes Telangana for some years; some early-year zero values reflect absent registration tooling, not absent vehicles).
